title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§352. Budget to include additional salary

           The governing authority of each of the parishes composing the Sixteenth Judicial District shall annually, and at the same time it prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries fixed in R.S. 16:351.
doc_text:
§352.  Budget to include additional salary
The governing authority of each of the parishes composing the
Sixteenth Judicial District shall annually, and at the same time it prepares its
general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salaries
fixed in R.S. 16:351.
